name: What is the biggest mistake businesses make when trying to appear in ChatGPT?
description: They write generic SEO copy instead of clear answers to the questions real customers ask.

mainEntity.name: What is the biggest mistake businesses make when trying to appear in ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: The biggest mistake is writing for search engines instead of answering the exact question a person would ask at 11 p.m. If your pages are clear, specific, and supported by trustworthy signals, they have a much better chance of being reused in ChatGPT answers.
acceptedAnswer.description: They write generic SEO copy instead of clear answers to the questions real customers ask.
